response.justification: Candidate has deep fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS, far exceeding the junior/mid-level requirements. However, they are a Senior/Staff-level engineer applying for an entry-level role, which raises significant concerns about compensation expectations, long-term retention, and role fit. The Berlin location matches the on-site requirement, but PostgreSQL exposure appears limited (primarily MongoDB/MySQL background).
strengths: Strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience across multiple senior roles
Berlin-based, satisfying high on-site presence requirement
Recent AI/LLM and MCP infrastructure work aligns with nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Massive seniority mismatch — Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry-level position
Limited PostgreSQL experience; primary database background is MongoDB and MySQL
Current career gap and frequent role changes may signal retention risk
